Name: BladeHomingAngSpeedParam
Description: Determines the homing angle and speed parameters for a blade melee attack.

Fields.Name: Tilt Model in Vertical Direction
Fields.Description: Tilt the model in the vertical movement direction

Fields.Name: Stop on Contact with Target
Fields.Description: Does it stop when it makes contact with the target?

Fields.Name: Inherit Rotation Angle
Fields.Description: Do you want to inherit the rotation angle from before the start of melee?

Fields.Name: Movement Vertical Correction
Fields.Description: How to correct vertical movement direction

Fields.Name: Turn Angular Velocity
Fields.Description: In degrees per second. -1 uses the character's velocity.

Fields.Name: Turn Angular Acceleration
Fields.Description: -1 uses the character's velocity ^ 2. Also, 0 is treated as infinity (the speed is always the same as the angular velocity). In degrees per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Vertical Turn Angular Velocity
Fields.Description: If -1, follow angular velocity: use the same value for left and right. In degrees per seconds.

Fields.Name: Vertical Turn Acceleration
Fields.Description: If -1, follow angular acceleration: use the same value for left and right. In degrees per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Model Vertical Rotation Angular Velocity
Fields.Description: If it is 1, apply the value of the above-mentioned velocity. In degrees per second.
